metadata.revision_note: STAGNATION BREAKER. Three critical experiments blocked for 3 consecutive reviews. Zero-GPU analyses undone for 3+ reviews. Gated execution model: Gate 0 (zero-GPU) -> Gate 1 (3 GPU experiments) -> Gate 2 (writing) -> Gate 3 (review). NO WRITING BEFORE GATE 1 COMPLETES.
metadata.key_lesson_from_reflection: Every score improvement was driven by experiments. Writing-only iterations produce +0.0. The paper is evidence-bound, not prose-bound. 3 GPU-hours will advance score from 6.5 to 7.5-8.0.

tasks.name: Data Integrity Validator (validate_integration.py)
tasks.description: GATE 0A. Implement the validate_integration.py script that has been recommended for 8 consecutive iterations. Cross-check ALL numbers in paper.md against source JSON files in exp/results/full/. Flag mismatches: vocabulary sizes (1092/1196/1204), absorption rates (14.39% vs 15.96% at L0=82), CMI rho values, cross-domain rates. Output a machine-readable validation report. Also identify all 9 persistent core words from confound_decomposition_multi_l0.json raw token data (currently only 5 named: eight/E, lower/L, liked/L, offer/O, often/O).
tasks.comment_on_time: Pure Python script: read JSON files, parse paper.md, compare numbers. No GPU needed. 90 min includes script development + running.

pilot.pass_criteria: All source JSON files read; all paper numbers extracted; mismatch report generated; all 9 persistent core words identified by name

decision_gates.condition: More than 5 number mismatches between paper.md and source JSON
decision_gates.action: Fix ALL mismatches before proceeding. This is non-negotiable data integrity.

decision_gates.condition: Parent recovers for 0/9 words after child zeroing
decision_gates.action: Strengthen the 'all-hedging / metric miscalibrated' narrative. The 9 core words are persistent FN due to reconstruction failure, not competitive exclusion. This is an equally strong publishable finding.
Confirm competitive exclusion exists at small scale. Revise paper to include causal evidence. This is the strongest possible result.
MAJOR NARRATIVE REVISION NEEDED. The 98.6% headline must be presented as permissive upper bound. Strict rate becomes the primary reported number. Discuss discrepancy transparently.
Headline 98.6% validated by strict check. Minor revision: add strict rate as confirmation.

decision_gates.condition: Pre-registered d'=10 Spearman rho non-significant (Bonferroni p > 0.05)
decision_gates.action: Downgrade Section 6 to 'Exploratory CMI-Absorption Association.' Remove 'predicts' language from abstract, intro, conclusion. Paper stands on two empirical pillars: control failure + L0 phase transition.

decision_gates.condition: Pre-registered d'=10 Spearman rho significant (Bonferroni p < 0.05)
decision_gates.action: Theoretical pillar secured. Keep Section 6 title but add Bonferroni p. The rate-distortion framing is supported with clean evidence.

decision_gates.overall_scoring: Gate 0 + Gate 1 all pass = expected score 7.5-8.0. Gate 0 pass + partial Gate 1 (2/3 experiments) = expected 7.0-7.5. Gate 0 only = expected 6.5-7.0 (marginal improvement from analysis depth). Writing-only (no experiments) = 6.5 again (4th consecutive stagnation). CRITICAL: Do NOT skip Gate 1.

execution_order.note: ALL zero-GPU tasks. Can run in parallel. BLOCKING for Gate 1 only for validate_integration (need 9 word identities for activation patching). Other Gate 0 tasks can overlap with Gate 1.

ALL GPU tasks. Can run in parallel on 3 separate GPUs (max_gpus=4 available). activation_patching depends on validate_integration (for word identities). tightened_hedging and cmi_replication can start immediately. BLOCKING for writing.
ONLY after ALL Gate 0 and Gate 1 tasks complete. Must incorporate all new results.

hard_constraints.description: The writing_revision task MUST NOT start until all 3 Gate 1 experiments complete. This is the project's most critical process constraint, designed to prevent the writing-loop-without-evidence pattern that caused 3 consecutive stagnation reviews.
hard_constraints.enforcement: writing_revision depends_on includes all Gate 0 and Gate 1 tasks.

hard_constraints.description: If compute resources are limited, prioritize Gate 1 experiments over Gate 0 analyses. Gate 1 provides the highest information gain per hour invested.

Every experiment and analysis in this plan MUST be reported in the paper, including negative results. The threshold sensitivity data (computed in iter_006, never reported) exemplifies the anti-pattern to avoid.

reusable_from_iter_006.resource: Conda environment with sae-lens, transformer-lens, torch, scipy, pygam
Gemma 2 2B model + Gemma Scope SAEs (L12-16k at L0=22,42,82,176; L12-65k; L10/L20-16k)
First-letter improved results (absorption rates, probe data)
Confound decomposition multi-L0 (657 FN at L0=22, 9 core words)
All cross-domain results (city-country, city-continent, city-language, animal-class)
